AbsencePattern.description: Recurring absence pattern (e.g. homeoffice every Monday)

lot_id.description: Parking lot ID the slot belongs to

AdminGrantCreditsRequest.description: Request body for admin credit grant

AdminResetRequest.description: Request body for database reset confirmation

AdminUpdateUserRequest.description: Request body for admin user update

AdminUserResponse.description: Response type for admin user listing (includes status field)

AutoReleaseSettingsRequest.description: Request body for auto-release settings update

CreateGuestBookingRequest.description: Request body for creating a guest booking

total_slots.description: Total number of parking slots to auto-generate (defaults to 10)

CreateRecurringBookingRequest.description: Request body for creating a recurring booking

CreateSwapRequestBody.description: Request body for creating a swap request

active.description: Whether the webhook is active (defaults to true)

url.description: Target URL for webhook delivery (must be HTTPS)

EmailSettingsRequest.description: Request body for email settings update

additional_minutes.description: Additional minutes to extend (15 min - 8 hours)

ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Request body for the forgot-password endpoint

ImportError.description: Describes a single row that failed during import.

field.description: The field that caused the failure (empty string if row-level).

row.description: 1-based row number in the CSV (excluding the header).

ImportResult.description: Result of a bulk CSV user import operation.

errors.description: Rows that failed validation or could not be imported.

JoinWaitlistRequest.description: Request body for joining the waitlist

ListModulesResponse.description:
Backwards-compatible envelope for `GET /api/v1/modules`.

- `modules`: the legacy flat Boolean map. Kept exactly as it was so
  old clients and integration tests keep passing.
- `module_info`: the enriched `Vec<ModuleInfo>` added in T-1720.
- `version`: the workspace crate version.

module_info.description: Enriched per-module metadata. Order matches the registry.

modules.description: Legacy flat feature map — `{ "bookings": true, "vehicles": true, … }`.

ModuleCategory.description:
Semantic grouping used by the admin Modules Dashboard.

Serialized as kebab-case (stable JSON, matches the kebab-case
module slugs and aligns with the Web UI category filter values).

ModuleInfo.description:
Runtime-serializable view of a [`ModuleDef`] with owned strings.

Two extra fields over `ModuleDef`:

- `runtime_toggleable` — `true` for modules that honour an admin
  setting that flips them on/off without a rebuild. `false` for v1
  across the board; flipped per-module as the runtime gate lands.
- `runtime_enabled` — effective enablement after applying any
  runtime override. For v1 this always equals `enabled`; when
  `runtime_toggleable` starts flipping to `true` the handler will
  consult the settings store to compute this.

depends_on.description: Other module slugs that must be enabled for this to work.

name.description: Stable slug — matches the feature flag without the `mod-` prefix.

runtime_enabled.description:
Effective enablement after applying the runtime override. Equal
to `enabled` when the module is not runtime-toggleable.

runtime_toggleable.description:
When true, the module's observable behavior can be toggled at
runtime via an admin setting (without a rebuild). The UI surfaces
a toggle only for these.

version.description: Semver — tied to the workspace version.

PrivacySettingsRequest.description: Request body for privacy settings update

RecommendationBadge.description: Recommendation reason badge for the frontend

ResetPasswordRequest.description: Request body for the reset-password endpoint

create_sample_data.description: Whether to create sample parking lot data

has_admin.description: Whether at least one admin user exists

has_parking_lots.description: Whether at least one parking lot exists

setup_completed.description: Whether initial setup has been completed

TranslationOverride.description: An approved translation override (applied at runtime)

UpdateCurrentUserRequest.description: Request body for updating the current user's profile

UpdateLotPricingRequest.description: Request body for updating lot pricing.

daily_max.description:
Daily price cap — the maximum charged for any single day of parking.
When set, `hourly_rate × hours` is capped at this value.

hourly_rate.description: Hourly rate in the lot's currency (e.g. 2.50 for €2.50/h)

monthly_pass.description: Monthly pass price (flat rate for the whole month)

UpdateModuleRequest.description:
Request body for the runtime-toggle endpoint.

A deliberately minimal shape — only `runtime_enabled` is settable
from the admin UI. `enabled` stays compile-time-only (matches the
underlying cargo feature flag and therefore a rebuild).

runtime_enabled.description:
New effective runtime enablement. Persisted to admin setting
`module.{name}.runtime_enabled`.

total_slots.description: Total number of slots (changing this will NOT auto-generate/remove slots)

UpdatePreferencesRequest.description: Request body for updating user preferences

monthly_quota.description: Monthly credit quota (0 = unlimited/no quota, max 999)

UpdateSwapRequestBody.description: Request body for accepting/declining a swap request

UpdateUserRoleRequest.description: Request body for updating a user's role

UpdateUserStatusRequest.description: Request body for updating a user's status

regenerate_secret.description: If true, regenerate the HMAC signing secret

VehiclePhotoUpload.description: Request body for uploading a vehicle photo as base64-encoded image data.

photo.description:
Base64-encoded image, optionally prefixed with a data URI scheme
(e.g. `data:image/jpeg;base64,...`).

fuel_type.description:
Powertrain / fuel type — feeds CO2 accounting. One of
`unknown`, `gasoline`, `diesel`, `hybrid`, `plugin_hybrid`,
`electric`, `hydrogen`. Omit for legacy clients; server defaults
to `unknown`.

info.description: Open-source parking lot management system API. Provides endpoints for user authentication, booking management, parking lot administration, credit system, webhooks, and more.
info.title: ParkHub API

get.description: Returns absences for the authenticated user.

post.description: Records a new absence for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get the current user's recurring absence pattern.

post.description: Save or update the current user's recurring absence pattern (e.g. homeoffice every Monday).

get.description: List all team member absences visible to the current user.

delete.description: Removes an absence owned by the user.

get.description: Returns all announcements. Admin only.

post.description: Create a new system announcement. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete an announcement by ID. Admin only.

put.description: Update an existing announcement by ID. Admin only.

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries. Filterable by action, user, date range.
Download all audit log entries as a CSV file. Supports optional date filtering via from and to query params (YYYY-MM-DD). Admin only.
Returns paginated bookings with enriched details. Admin only.

post.description: Reset all active non-admin users' credit balances to their monthly quota. Admin only.

get.description: Returns aggregated chart data for the admin dashboard.
Download all bookings as a CSV file. Supports optional date filtering via from and to query params (YYYY-MM-DD). Admin only.
Download a daily revenue summary as a CSV file. Groups completed/active bookings by date. Supports optional date filtering via from and to query params (YYYY-MM-DD). Admin only.
Download all users as a CSV file. Supports optional date filtering (by created_at) via from and to query params (YYYY-MM-DD). Admin only.
Returns feature modules with status. Admin only.

put.description: Sets enabled feature modules. Admin only.

get.description: List all guest bookings. Admin only.

patch.description: Cancel a guest booking by ID. Admin only.

get.description: Returns booking counts by weekday and hour.
Returns current Impressum fields for editing. Admin only.

put.description: Saves DDG paragraph 5 Impressum fields. Admin only.

patch.description: Admin-only. Flips a runtime-toggleable module on/off via admin setting `module.{name}.runtime_enabled`. Returns 400 for unknown slug and 409 when the module is marked runtime_toggleable=false (security-sensitive — cannot be disabled without a rebuild). Audit-logged.

get.description: Return privacy and GDPR settings. Admin only.

put.description: Update privacy and GDPR settings. Admin only.

get.description: Returns daily booking stats.

post.description: Wipes all data. Destructive. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all system settings. Admin only.
Return the auto-release timing configuration. Admin only.

put.description: Update auto-release timing for unclaimed bookings. Admin only.

get.description: Return SMTP configuration (password masked). Admin only.

put.description: Update SMTP settings for outgoing emails. Admin only.

get.description: Return current use-case with theme config. Admin only.
Returns aggregated system stats.
Returns paginated registered users. Admin only.

post.description: Upload a plain-text CSV body to create multiple users at once. Column order: `username,email,name,role,password` (role and password optional). Maximum 500 rows per request. Admin only.

requestBody.description: CSV data with header row: username,email,name,role,password

delete.description: Anonymizes user data per GDPR. Admin only.

post.description: Add credits to a user's balance. Amount must be 1-10000. Admin only.

put.description: Set a user's monthly credit allowance (0-999). Admin only.

patch.description: Changes a user's role. Prevents privilege escalation.
Sets a user's active/inactive status. Admin only.

put.description: Admin can update any user's details (name, email, department, etc.).

get.description: Returns active non-expired announcements. No auth required.

post.description: Send a password reset email. Always returns 200 to prevent user enumeration.

200.description: Reset email sent (always succeeds to prevent enumeration)

post.description: Authenticate with username/email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair.
Create a new user account. May be disabled via admin settings.
Set a new password using a one-time reset token from the forgot-password email.

get.description: Returns all bookings for the authenticated user.

post.description: Books a parking slot for the authenticated user.
Create a visitor parking booking with a guest code.
Auto-picks an available slot and creates a booking.

get.description: Returns top slot recommendations based on user history, favorites, and availability.

delete.description: Cancels an active booking and releases the slot.

get.description: Returns a single booking. Only the owner can access it.

post.description: Marks a booking as checked-in.

get.description: Generates a text invoice for a booking.

Returns a PNG image containing a QR code that encodes booking details (ID, user email, lot name, start/end times). Requires authentication; only the booking owner or an admin may request it. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.

post.description: Create a parking slot swap request for a booking.

get.description: Returns bookings and absences as calendar events.
Returns enabled and available features. No auth required.
Returns DDG paragraph 5 Impressum data. No auth required.
Returns all parking lots with their configuration and status.

post.description: Create a new parking lot with auto-generated slots. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently remove a parking lot and all its slots. Admin only.

get.description: Returns full details of a single parking lot.

put.description: Update parking lot properties. Admin only.

get.description: Returns the current pricing configuration for the specified parking lot.

put.description: Update hourly rate, daily cap, monthly pass, and currency for a parking lot. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated. Admin only.

get.description: Returns a `data:image/png;base64,…` URL with a QR code encoding the lot's booking page. Generated locally via the `qrcode` + `image` crates — no external service.
get.summary: Generate QR code for a lot (local)

get.description: Returns parking slots in the specified lot. Optionally filter by `slot_type` (standard, compact, large, handicap, electric, motorcycle, reserved, vip), `status` (available, occupied, reserved, maintenance, disabled), or `feature` (near_exit, near_elevator, near_stairs, covered, security_camera, well_lit, wide_lane, charging_station).

200.description: List of slots in the parking lot

get.summary: List slots in a parking lot

post.description: Add a new slot to a parking lot. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove a slot from a parking lot. Admin only.

put.description: Update slot properties (status, type, label, etc.). Admin only.

get.description: Returns all zones defined in the specified parking lot.

post.description: Create a new zone within a parking lot. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove a zone from a parking lot. Admin only.

get.description: Returns compile-time module enablement as both the legacy flat Boolean map and an enriched array of ModuleInfo objects (category, description, config keys, UI route, dependencies, runtime_toggleable, runtime_enabled).
Returns enriched ModuleInfo for one module, keyed by its stable slug (matches the feature flag without the `mod-` prefix). Runtime setting overrides are applied.
get.summary: Get a single module by slug

get.description: Returns recent notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Marks all notifications as read.

get.description: Returns minimal HTML for digital signage.
Returns real-time occupancy. No auth required.

post.description: Register a Web Push subscription endpoint for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Remove all push notification subscriptions for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the server's VAPID public key for Web Push subscription. No auth required.
List the current user's recurring booking patterns.

post.description: Create a new recurring booking pattern (e.g. every Tuesday 8-17).

delete.description: Delete a recurring booking pattern. Verifies ownership.

post.description: Create the first admin user and configure the system. Only works before setup is completed.

400.description: Setup already completed or validation error

get.description: Check whether initial setup has been completed. Public endpoint.
List the current user's swap requests (as requester or target).

put.description: Accept or decline a swap request.

get.description: Returns all active team members.
Returns all users with their status for today.
Returns theme and company name. No auth required.
Returns all approved translation overrides for runtime i18n patching.
Returns the user's bookings in iCalendar format.
Returns the authenticated user's credit balance, monthly quota, and recent transactions.

200.description: User credit balance and recent transactions

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's pinned/favorite parking slots.

post.description: Pin a parking slot as a favorite for quick access.

delete.description: Unpin a parking slot from the user's favorites.

get.description: Returns user preferences.
Returns personal parking stats.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name, phone, and/or profile picture.

delete.description: Anonymizes user PII while preserving booking records.

get.description: Exports all personal data as JSON download.
Retrieves any user's profile. Admin/SuperAdmin only.
Returns all vehicles registered by the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds a vehicle to the authenticated user's account.

get.description: Returns a map of German Kfz-Kennzeichen area codes to city names.

delete.description: Removes a vehicle. Only the owner can delete.

put.description: Updates vehicle details. Only the owner can update.

get.description: Returns the stored vehicle photo as binary.

post.description: Uploads a base64-encoded vehicle photo (JPEG or PNG, max 2 MB).

get.description: Returns waitlist entries for the authenticated user.

post.description: Adds the user to a lot waitlist.

delete.description: Removes the user from a waitlist entry.

get.description: Returns all configured webhooks. Admin only.

post.description: Register a new webhook endpoint. URL must be HTTPS and pass SSRF validation. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently remove a webhook. Admin only.

put.description: Update an existing webhook's URL, events, or active status. Admin only.

post.description: Deliver a test payload to verify webhook connectivity. Admin only.
Verifies protocol version compatibility between client and server.

get.description: Returns 200 OK when the server is running.
Returns 200 if the process is alive.
Returns 200 when the service can accept traffic.
Returns aggregate server statistics.
